checks.query:
-- table_stats.sql
-- Size metrics and the planner's estimated row count for a single relation.
-- Read-only. Placeholders are substituted with quoted string literals
-- (schema name, table name, and qualified name passed to the pg_*_size calls).
SELECT
    pg_total_relation_size('public.audit_log')                 AS total_bytes,
    pg_table_size('public.audit_log')                          AS table_bytes,
    pg_indexes_size('public.audit_log')                        AS index_bytes,
    pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size('public.audit_log')) AS total_pretty,
    pg_size_pretty(pg_table_size('public.audit_log'))          AS table_pretty,
    pg_size_pretty(pg_indexes_size('public.audit_log'))        AS index_pretty,
    c.reltuples::bigint                                        AS estimated_rows
FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
  AND c.relname = 'audit_log'

checks.message: Row count estimate requires online mode
checks.query:
-- table_stats.sql
-- Size metrics and the planner's estimated row count for a single relation.
-- Read-only. Placeholders are substituted with quoted string literals
-- (schema name, table name, and qualified name passed to the pg_*_size calls).
SELECT
    pg_total_relation_size('public.audit_log')                 AS total_bytes,
    pg_table_size('public.audit_log')                          AS table_bytes,
    pg_indexes_size('public.audit_log')                        AS index_bytes,
    pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size('public.audit_log')) AS total_pretty,
    pg_size_pretty(pg_table_size('public.audit_log'))          AS table_pretty,
    pg_size_pretty(pg_indexes_size('public.audit_log'))        AS index_pretty,
    c.reltuples::bigint                                        AS estimated_rows
FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
  AND c.relname = 'audit_log'

SELECT count(*) AS duplicate_groups, coalesce(sum(c) - count(*), 0) AS extra_rows
FROM (
    SELECT id, count(*) AS c
    FROM public.audit_log
    WHERE id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY id
    HAVING count(*) > 1
) d

checks.message: Table participates in no foreign-key relationships

checks.query:
-- column_stats.sql
-- Per-column null and cardinality profile. Read-only.
-- The column placeholder is a quoted identifier; the relation placeholder is a
-- FROM-clause expression (optionally a LIMIT sample subquery).
SELECT
    count(*)                                  AS total_rows,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE id IS NULL)  AS null_rows,
    count(DISTINCT id)                  AS distinct_values
FROM public.audit_log

SELECT
    min(id) AS min_value,
    max(id) AS max_value,
    avg(id::double precision) AS avg_value
FROM public.audit_log

-- column_stats.sql
-- Per-column null and cardinality profile. Read-only.
-- The column placeholder is a quoted identifier; the relation placeholder is a
-- FROM-clause expression (optionally a LIMIT sample subquery).
SELECT
    count(*)                                  AS total_rows,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE table_name IS NULL)  AS null_rows,
    count(DISTINCT table_name)                  AS distinct_values
FROM public.audit_log

SELECT
    avg(length(table_name::text)) AS avg_length,
    min(length(table_name::text)) AS min_length,
    max(length(table_name::text)) AS max_length
FROM public.audit_log

-- column_stats.sql
-- Per-column null and cardinality profile. Read-only.
-- The column placeholder is a quoted identifier; the relation placeholder is a
-- FROM-clause expression (optionally a LIMIT sample subquery).
SELECT
    count(*)                                  AS total_rows,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE action IS NULL)  AS null_rows,
    count(DISTINCT action)                  AS distinct_values
FROM public.audit_log

SELECT
    avg(length(action::text)) AS avg_length,
    min(length(action::text)) AS min_length,
    max(length(action::text)) AS max_length
FROM public.audit_log

-- column_stats.sql
-- Per-column null and cardinality profile. Read-only.
-- The column placeholder is a quoted identifier; the relation placeholder is a
-- FROM-clause expression (optionally a LIMIT sample subquery).
SELECT
    count(*)                                  AS total_rows,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE at IS NULL)  AS null_rows,
    count(DISTINCT at)                  AS distinct_values
FROM public.audit_log

SELECT
    min(at) AS min_value,
    max(at) AS max_value,
    NULL AS avg_value
FROM public.audit_log
